last_debrief: First production session — 11 cold fires including venum, keele, anga, illa, enaku, nalla. 'Vai' and 'poren' needed recasts — hit them early next time. 'Konjam' explained but never produced — set up a situation for it. Sentence construction emerging naturally (illa enaku nalla energetic).
status: 8 episodes under-listened (~24 min). Re-listen playlist recommended before new production.
